metadata.description: ServiceNow skills for Claude — SPA development, UI components, design system, pricing/licensing, and Flow Designer analysis

plugins.name: building-servicenow-spas
plugins.description: Builds and deploys Single Page Applications to ServiceNow using Vite single-file bundling, HashRouter, and dual-mode authentication. Handles new SPA creation, existing app conversion, deployment pipelines, and ServiceNow artifact setup.

plugins.name: building-servicenow-components
plugins.description: Builds custom ServiceNow UI Builder components using the Next Experience UI Framework. Covers createCustomElement, immutable state with updateState, action handlers, HTTP effects, Now Components, CLI setup, and deployment.

plugins.name: servicenow-pricing
plugins.description: ServiceNow pricing and packaging expert. Use when answering questions about ServiceNow product pricing, licensing, SKUs, packaging tiers, module comparisons, Now Assist, AI features, or any ServiceNow commercial questions.

plugins.name: design-servicenow-style
plugins.description: ServiceNow design system guide for building apps that look and feel native to the ServiceNow platform. Covers Next Experience (Horizon/Polaris) workspace components, Service Portal (AngularJS) widgets, and Classic UI styling. Provides colors, typography, spacing, component patterns, accessibility guidelines, and code samples.

plugins.name: mobiz-servicenow-flow-designer
plugins.description: ServiceNow Flow Designer analysis, diagnostics, and programmatic creation. Describes flow structure, fetches runtime execution details, drills into subflows, generates Mermaid diagrams, discovers action type inputs, and builds flows programmatically via API with gzip/base64 encoded values payloads. Supports V1 and V2 table formats.

plugins.name: mobiz-servicenow-spm
plugins.description: Manage ServiceNow Strategic Portfolio Management artifacts via AI Bridge (Mobiz-aware). Create/read/update/delete projects, tasks, milestones, epics, stories, resource plans, demands. Import complete project hierarchies from SOW. Covers SPM, project portfolio, pm_project, rm_story, rm_epic, demand management, resource plan, project task, milestone, agile backlog, SOW import, project hierarchy.

plugins.name: develop-remote-mcp
plugins.description: Build and deploy remote MCP servers with OAuth authentication, StreamableHTTP transport, and Railway hosting. Covers MCP SDK architecture, single dispatcher pattern, dual transport, OAuth bridge pattern, persistent token storage, and Claude Desktop connector setup.

plugins.name: mobiz-servicenow-awa-schedules
plugins.description: ServiceNow schedule management and AWA eligibility validation. Fetch working hours, add time off, update schedules, check availability, and diagnose AWA routing issues. Covers cmn_schedule, schedule spans, timezone conversion, admin auth checks, and 6-point AWA diagnostics.

plugins.name: mobiz-servicenow-pdf
plugins.description: Generate PDF reports server-side in ServiceNow using PDFGenerationAPI with inline SVG charts, CSS styling, tables, and images. Covers convertToPDF, convertToPDFWithHeaderFooter, CSS3 Paged Media, custom fonts, and the full pattern of HTML rendering + PDF attachment. Use when building PDF reports, generating PDFs from HTML, creating SVG charts for PDFs, or automating PDF email attachments in ServiceNow.
